------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Uhm. I'll drop out of college in a year or two, yeah. And my condition is getting worse. I've been having really bad thoughts that I can't even tell my friends about. I did poorly in one of my exams, and I have to retake it. It's thrown me off balance... really badly. And also, I'm another year closer to death, jajajaja.

I suspect that soon my bad thoughts might spill over into... a bad action. I don't want the Janitor administration to ban me for making more specific statements. I hope everyone who reads this is safe, given the current global situation. I'm really trying to hold on, but I just don't have the strength.

I hope my friends don't read this, I'd be very embarrassed.

Good luck to everyone. (⌒_⌒;)
